title: Keemat
subTitle: After two thugs accidentally kill a man, they hide the truth from his family and try to save his village from the torments of an evil landlord in order to redeem themselves.

title: Gurudev
subTitle: Dev Kumar, a police inspector, finds himself in a dilemma when has to arrest a notorious criminal who also happens to the father of his childhood friend, Guru.

title: Gurudev
subTitle: Dev Kumar, a police inspector, finds himself in a dilemma when has to arrest a notorious criminal who also happens to the father of his childhood friend, Guru.

title: Hiraasat
subTitle: An honest policeman who lives with his wife and a brother who is a student, gets implicated and arrested in a case of drug-trafficking.

title: Hiraasat
subTitle: An honest policeman who lives with his wife and a brother who is a student, gets implicated and arrested in a case of drug-trafficking.

title: Wafadaar
subTitle: Chanda's parents disapprove of her boyfriend Ranga and want her to marry Prasad. Ranga is accused of having an affair with Sita.

title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: B4U Movies
subTitle: A gangster's driver takes the blame for an accident, leaving his family alone. He seeks revenge when he finds out what happened to them while he was gone.

title: Ganga Tere Desh Mein
subTitle: After arresting and institutionalising a notorious criminal who has lost his mental faculties, inspector Ajay finds his mother feeding the criminal. But when he digs deeper he uncovers a tragic truth.

title: Majaal
subTitle: Vijay Kumar, an orphan, is brought up by an advocate. While he falls in love with his daughter and marries her, he struggles to cope with the humiliation he faces from her family.

title: Majaal
subTitle: Vijay Kumar, an orphan, is brought up by an advocate. While he falls in love with his daughter and marries her, he struggles to cope with the humiliation he faces from her family.

title: Mast
subTitle: College student Kittu is obsessed with a famous actress. He neglects his studies and sets out to find her and confess his love.

title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Lashkar
subTitle: Professor Anand's life changes dramatically when Sangram Singh murders his family and assaults his sister. Devastated, Anand decides to seek revenge with Inspector Sumeet's help.

title: Kahani Kismat Ki
subTitle: After his release from jail, a criminal tries to make an honest living. However, his plans go awry when a woman claims that he is her husband and later he is arrested for murder.

title: Mela
subTitle: Best mates Kishen and Shankar decide to help village belle Roopa avenge her family's death, but their friendship is tested in the process.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
subTitle: Separated at birth, Kishen and Kanhaiya grow up in different worlds, one in opulent luxury, the other in poverty. Fate reunites them as they fight together to end injustice.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Jungle
subTitle: Siddharth must swing into action when his girlfriend and her family are kidnapped and held for ransom by bandits. With danger lurking at every step, the family safari becomes a fight for survival.
